title: Fresh French Zucchini Salad
description: A light, kid-friendly salad with fresh zucchini ribbons, basil, and a simple whisked vinaigrette, perfect for a diabetic-friendly lunch.

ingredients.name: zucchini
ingredients.notes: cut into ribbons with a vegetable peeler

instructions: Rinse the zucchini and use a vegetable peeler to create thin ribbons. 1
In a large bowl combine the zucchini ribbons, halved cherry tomatoes, diced cucumber, sliced red onion, and capers. 2
Toss the salad gently to mix the vegetables. 3
In a small bowl whisk together olive oil, white wine vinegar, Dijon mustard, minced garlic, salt, and pepper until fully blended. 4
Pour the vinaigrette over the salad and toss again to coat all ingredients evenly. 5
Gently fold in the crumbled feta cheese. 6
Transfer the salad to serving plates and sprinkle chopped fresh basil leaves on top. 7
Serve immediately or refrigerate for up to 2 hours before serving. 8
